title: Are any of these Eva Games worth playing
display_title: Are any of these Eva Games worth playing
wikitext:
[]: Are any of these Eva Games worth playing??             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 21, 2007 3:42 pm I know that there's a topic about that Speical Cases game, but there are several things in particular I want to ask about: (and sorry for any spelling errors!) First off, for PS2 type convertors [for import games], do they work well and/or are there any for sale that aren't on the expensive side?? Besides that, are any of these worth the $ as well as the time spent playing?? What? I need to have something to do in the Summer! :mrgreen: And in terms of "worth it", I bascially mean is it fun. I enjoyed both GoS1 and 2 although both games are cheesy, so it doesn't take much to impress me. ^^; Speical Cases: Endless or at least various combos of the path you can take? (such as a few different endings for the same character) The most baltent example I can think of: If you're playing as Shinji, Rei, or Asuka, can you choose who they end up "falling in love" with? Also, is it an RPG throughout the game (how RPGs usually are ;)), or an RPG in the sense that you chose your character at the start? Decitivate Evangelion: Is this any good? I only know about it through the Newtype Japan October issue and the Newtype USA December issue. Raise Ayanami with Asuka Completion( remembering title wrong?) Project: Can you choose either girl's love interest, is the option either the caretaker or Shinji? LOL, that would be creepy AND weird if you could also choose Gendou in Rei's case and Kaji in Asuka's case. :shock: I know that the Ayanami with Asuka game has the seiyuu, but what about the other two? I didn't plan on asking about these, but I thought I might as well: What about 1st (is this the game where Shinji gets amneisa or was that something else?) and 2nd Impression (one with "female Shinji")? And are those done by the seiyuu, if they speak at all? And finally, where the hell can I purchase any of these? I'm assuming Eva Store doesn't ship internationally (although they should! ) and haven't used Amazon Japan before, though I guess I could give it a try... Ebay? Half.com?? Thanks in advance for any replies!

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Feb 21, 2007 5:13 pm You should emulate Evangelion 64.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Feb 21, 2007 6:09 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: You should emulate Evangelion 64.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Feb 21, 2007 8:37 pm Hey Avery, i'm seeing wut u did thar.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Feb 21, 2007 8:38 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Hey Avery, i'm seeing wut u did thar.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Feb 21, 2007 8:40 pm I'm just wondering why the hell our profiles have the same content <_< Is it just me, or did you do some trick with phpbb, or what?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Feb 21, 2007 8:45 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Is it just me, or did you do some trick with phpbb, or what?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Feb 21, 2007 9:10 pm NAveryW wrote: Try using Project 64. It looks much more accurate to the TV version on there.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Feb 21, 2007 11:00 pm Not to detract from this thread, but while on the google one day, I found this nifty website of this guy who makes handheld versions of game consoles. http://benheck.com/ Like this for the N64: I hope to replicate stuff like this soon so I can play damn near any game on any console on any format. Including Eva 64 and the Playstation and PC games.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Feb 21, 2007 11:00 pm I beat Evangelion 64 on easy mode, so unfortunately I didn't get to fight the MP Eva series. I'll probably try hard mode when I get bored sometime. I've also played through the fan-sub of Girlfriend of Steel. It's not really much of a game, but it's a fairly fun little thing to go through if you like fanservice (and I'm not just talking about the naughty kind, mind you). I would really like to play Evangelion 2, but since it is all in Japanese I would be missing out on most of what makes that game worth anything (the story). You get to control Shinji's life and ultimately decide what becomes of him, which sounds interesting... Particularly how you can have Shinji woo Asuka or Rei, which he never got the stones to do in the show.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 22, 2007 12:30 pm So Evangelion 2 has nothing to do with Speical Cases, two seperate games all togehter? Which one is "better" as it were? ^^; It's hard to keep track! And part of the reason I'd want to play both those Raising Projects (Ayanami with Asuka) as well as Ikari Shinji one (which I failed to mention earlier) is because it seems like you can pair Shinji with whoever in his. ^^; I have the song "Get it On! To Kiss a Dooplerganger" so I know how much it rocks ;) Hmm... as long as that SwapMagic think doesn't fuck up my dad's PS2, I'm game. (Ha, pun intended!) I'm pretty sure we own the older version...

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Thu Feb 22, 2007 3:35 pm That's pretty awesome, but isn't a Nintendo DS pretty much as powerful as an N64 already?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Feb 22, 2007 4:39 pm Conrad Gray wrote: That's pretty awesome, but isn't a Nintendo DS pretty much as powerful as an N64 already?

[]:             Quote Post by C4 » Thu Feb 22, 2007 5:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hmm... as long as that SwapMagic think doesn't fuck up my dad's PS2, I'm game.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 22, 2007 11:04 pm Quick question: Is the Ikari Shinji Raising Project avabile via bittorrent or on a website? Hmm....I guess with games, maybe I'd just go with the Ayanami and Asuka one?? Though Speical Cases and Evangelion 2 sound good as well from what y'all said... *sigh* :( (sucks how I'd only have enough $ to buy one. ; )

[]: rambling yay             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 23, 2007 12:29 pm I'm not asking anybody to write out the link or anything, I'm just asking whether it's avabile or not. Anyway, google's your friend, so whatever. ;) download the Saturn Evangelion ISOs, could someone please PM me a link or something?

[]: Re: rambling yay             Quote Post by C4 » Fri Feb 23, 2007 1:06 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: @ C4: Who sings You are Your Own Reason?
